top3.sql:
WITH driver_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        c.constructor_id,
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        SUM(res.points) AS total_points
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructors c ON res.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001 AND res.points > 0
    GROUP BY r.year, d.driver_id, d.for...

WITH driver_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        ds.driver_id,
        ds.points AS driver_points
    FROM driver_standings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.race_id = r.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    AND ds.points > 0
),
constructor_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        cr.constructor_id,
        SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
    FROM constructor_results cr
    JOIN races r ON cr.race_id = r.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY r.year, cr.constructor_i...

WITH driver_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        c.constructor_id,
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        SUM(res.points) AS total_points
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructors c ON res.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001 AND res.points > 0
    GROUP BY r.year, d.driver_id, d.for...
